response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished individual contributor with 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience across a wide range of domains, but the resume contains zero evidence of people management — the central and non-negotiable requirement for this Level II Manager role. Every listed position is an IC role; there is no mention of direct reports, hiring, performance reviews, or team development. While he has touched developer tooling (CI setup, test frameworks, MCP tooling) and has some mobile exposure, the depth and duration of that experience falls short of the 3-year developer-tools and 3-year technical leadership minimums, and the complete absence of people management disqualifies him from a full-time leadership role of this scope.
strengths: Broad technical depth spanning 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Genuine developer tooling contributions including a D-language test runner (Trial), CI/CD infrastructure setup, and MCP code generators
Some mobile platform exposure through iOS and Apple TV development, partially aligning with the mobile ecosystem focus
concerns: No people management experience of any kind documented — no direct reports, no hiring, no performance management
No evidence of organizational leadership, roadmap ownership, or cross-team alignment responsibilities
Staff-level titles appear to be senior IC roles, not leadership positions; no indication of team size or mentorship beyond informal Refactoring Dojos
